zh.lifeSummary: 當Baldwin De Brugge於1328年出生在英國賀福爾萊頓時，他的父親Sir John de Brugge33歲，母親Sara-21歲。他於1354年與Isabel Grandison在英國英格蘭結婚。他去世於1377年在英國英格蘭賀福爾賀福德享年49歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀福爾布里奇 索萊爾。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Brugge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch (Van der Brugge): topographic name for someone living near a brug ‘bridge’.
Flemish and Dutch: habitational name from Bruges.
North German (Brügge): variant of Bruck or a habitational name from any of several places called Brügge.

variants.name: Bruck
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Naftali, Eliahu, Hershel, Meyer, Ruvim, Shloime, Yoav.

German (also Brück): topographic name for someone who lived near a bridge, or an occupational name for a bridge keeper or toll collector on a bridge, from Middle High German bruck(e) ‘bridge’. Bruck remained the Bavarian and Austrian form, reflected in placenames such as Innsbruck, whereas in central and northern Germany Brück(e) was the regular and ultimately standard form, as for example in the placename Osnabrück. Switzerland has both forms. See also Brueck .
Jewish (from Poland and Belarus): from Polish, Belorussian, or Yiddish bruk ‘pavement’, possibly a metonymic occupational name for a paver.

nameMeanings.name: Baldwin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from bald ‘bold, brave’ + wine ‘friend’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. In the Middle Ages it was a comparatively common name, which gave rise to a surname. It was borne by the Norman crusader Baldwin of Boulogne, who in 1100 was elected first king of Jerusalem, and by four further crusader kings of Jerusalem. It continued to be used by some families in England into the 17th century, but in modern times it normally represents a transferred use of the surname rather than a direct revival of the Norman given name.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Baldwin De Brugge was born in 1328, in Letton, Herefordshire, England, his father, Sir John de Brugge, was 33 and his mother, Sara, was -21. He married Isabel Grandison in 1354, in England, United Kingdom. He died in 1377, in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 49, and was buried in Bridge Sollers, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Baldwin De Brugge est né en 1328, à Letton, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John de Brugge, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Sara, avait -21 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Grandison en 1354, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé en 1377, à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Bridge Sollers, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat 1354 in England, United Kingdom Isabel Grandison geheiratet. ko.lifeSummary: Baldwin De Brugge(이)가 1328년 영국 허퍼드실르 레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John de Brugge(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Sara(은)는 -21세였다. 그는 1354년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Isabel Grandison(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1377년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 브리지 솔레르스에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baldwin De Brugge родился в 1328 г. в местности леттон, хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John de Brugge было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Sara, -21. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Grandison в 1354 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. Он умер в 1377 г. в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности бридж соллирс, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания.
